hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$cmd=$env:CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_COMMAND; if($cmd -match 'rm\s+-rf|git\s+push\s+--force|git\s+reset\s+--hard|DROP\s+TABLE|format\s+[A-Z]:'){Write-Host 'BLOCKED: Dangerous command pattern detected'; exit 2}"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$t=$env:CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_TYPE;$a=$env:CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_APPROVE;$c=$env:CLAUDE_TOOL_ARG_CONTENT;if($t -eq 'plan_approval_response' -and $a -eq 'true'){if(-not $c -or $c.Length -lt 100){Write-Host 'BLOCKED(PA-01): Plan approval requires 8-dimension scoring. Content too short.';exit 2};if($c -notmatch '\d\.?\d?\s*/\s*5'){Write-Host 'BLOCKED(PA-01): Plan approval missing X/5 scoring format.';exit 2}}"
powershell -NoProfile -Command "if(Test-Path tsconfig.json){$r=npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1|Select -First 15; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){Write-Host 'TypeScript errors:'; $r|ForEach{Write-Host $_}; exit 2}}"

powershell -NoProfile -Command "$cargo=Get-ChildItem -Recurse -Depth 2 -Filter Cargo.toml -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue|Select -First 1; if($cargo){$r=cargo check --manifest-path $cargo.FullName 2>&1|Select -Last 10; if($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0){Write-Host 'Rust compilation errors:'; $r|ForEach{Write-Host $_}; exit 2}}"

hooks.prompt:
VERIFICATION COMPLETENESS CHECK (v7.0):

Before ending session, verify:
1. If ANY implementation tasks exist (coder-be/coder-fe/ui-designer completed work), do verification agent tasks also exist and are completed?
2. Implementation done + verification NOT done = DO NOT end. Flag: 'INCOMPLETE: Verification stages pending.'
3. No verification agents created at all = Flag: 'CRITICAL: No verification agents exist.'

Only end if: (a) no implementation done, OR (b) all verification also completed.

TRANSPARENCY REMINDER:

Before stopping, provide user a brief status update:
- What was accomplished this session
- What remains to be done
- Any blockers or decisions needed

hooks.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$td=Join-Path $env:USERPROFILE '.claude/teams';if(Test-Path $td){$c=@();$c+=Get-ChildItem (Join-Path $td '*/config.json') -EA SilentlyContinue;$c+=Get-ChildItem (Join-Path $td '*.json') -EA SilentlyContinue;$lc=$c|Sort LastWriteTime -Desc|Select -First 1;if($lc){$j=Get-Content $lc -Raw|ConvertFrom-Json;if($j.members){$n=$j.members|ForEach-Object{$_.name};$hi=$n|Where-Object{$_ -match 'coder|ui-designer'};$hv=$n|Where-Object{$_ -match 'reviewer|e2e-verifier|debugger'};if($hi -and -not $hv){Write-Host ('BLOCKED(TG-01): Team has impl agents ['+($hi-join',')+'] but NO verification agents. Add per task level.');exit 2}}}}"

hooks.prompt:
QUALITY CHECK (v7.0 五条铁律, 6 checks):

A teammate has stopped. Perform ALL checks below.

== 1. EVIDENCE (V-01: 完成必须附证据) ==
Did they provide actual execution evidence? 'Completed' without evidence = violation.

== 2. EXIT CONDITIONS (S-02: 子阶段要有证据) ==
Were ALL exit conditions addressed with evidence? Missing any = violation.

== 3. RUNTIME (DB-01: 先看现场再动手) ==
Did they RUN the code? 'cargo check' alone is insufficient. Runtime verification required.

== 4. COMPLETENESS ==
Did they skip any steps? Check task description vs actual work.

== 5. TASK STATUS ==
Call TaskList. Are all required verification agent tasks present per task level?
- S: @reviewer
- M: @reviewer + @e2e-verifier
- L/XL: @debugger + @cross-checker + @reviewer + @e2e-verifier
Missing = CRITICAL violation.

== 6. GIT COMMIT ==
If this was an implementation agent (coder-be/coder-fe/ui-designer) and quality check PASSED:
- Run 'git status' to check for uncommitted changes
- If changes exist: remind Lead to commit with appropriate scope (feat-be/feat-fe/design)
- If no changes: skip

== OUTPUT ==
```
QUALITY CHECK:
[1] Evidence:     PASS/FAIL
[2] Exit Conds:   PASS/FAIL
[3] Runtime:      PASS/FAIL
[4] Completeness: PASS/FAIL
[5] Task Status:  PASS/FAIL
[6] Git Commit:   DONE/PENDING/N-A
OVERALL: PASS/FAIL
```
Any FAIL = recommend corrective action.

ERROR HISTORY CHECK:

Check .team-logs/bug-history.md for patterns related to the completed agent's work area. If similar bugs were previously recorded, flag them:
'PATTERN ALERT: Similar issue found in bug-history. Verify it hasn't recurred.'
